acceptance_criteria_fulfilled: AC-OVR-001 — TOML overlay scalar override (model, style) documented as Tier 1 with override precedence
AC-OVR-002 — Array of tables append semantics documented (Tier 2); plugin defaults BEFORE project additions
AC-OVR-003 — Table deep merge documented (Tier 3); absent key inherited from plugin default
AC-OVR-004 — Syntax error halts dispatch with [ERROR] + file path + line number (conditional) documented
AC-OVR-005 — Unknown key halts dispatch with [ERROR] naming the offending key; [meta] exempt
AC-OVR-006 — .toml + .md coexistence: .toml takes precedence; exact [WARN] text documented
AC-OVR-007 — Legacy .md-only: v7 backward compat; exact [WARN] text with migrate fragment documented
AC-OVR-008 — Provenance log format documented: agent= overlay_source={toml|md|none} overlay_path= all 3 branches; exactly once per dispatch; pipeline.log destination
AC-NF-001 — v7->v8 backward compat: legacy .md overlays parsed with [WARN], pipeline does not abort
AC-NF-006 — TOML parser tooling neutrality: python3 tomllib used with tomli backport fallback; spec does not mandate specific parser

self_review_notes: core/ maxdepth-1 count verified = 16 (unchanged). Both files contain no hooks:/mcpServers:/permissionMode: keys. All 29 individual content assertions from the 8 test files were manually run against core/overlay/toml-overlay.md — 29/29 pass. Tests reference docs/guides/toml-overlay-syntax.md as primary assertion target; that file is created by task T-030 (docs deliverables). My core/overlay/toml-overlay.md is the contract document; docs/guides/toml-overlay-syntax.md will be the user-facing guide containing the same content in tutorial form. The toml-merge.sh bash implementation covers all 4 required functions with production-quality error handling, POSIX compatibility, and python3 tomllib (with tomli backport fallback for Python < 3.11). resolve_overlay() high-level helper handles all 3 REQ-OVR-005/006 branches correctly.
deviations_from_plan: Moved core/toml-overlay.md → core/overlay/toml-overlay.md (sub-namespace parallel to core/snippets/, core/aliases/) to preserve core/ maxdepth-1 = 16 invariant per spec design.md §1.1 which states 'core/ (16 contracts — unchanged)'. Plan files_modified listed stale path 'core/toml-overlay.md'.

Test files reference docs/guides/toml-overlay-syntax.md as assertion target; T-001 creates core/overlay/toml-overlay.md (contract) not the user-facing guide. This is by design: T-001 scope is contract + lib; T-030 creates the user-facing guide. All 8 tests include SKIP (exit 77) logic when the target docs files are absent — no test will fail (only skip) until T-030 runs.
skills/setup-agents/lib/ directory created as new sub-directory (not listed in plan as explicit dir creation, but implied by files_modified path skills/setup-agents/lib/toml-merge.sh).
